description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure set within a landscaped plot featuring numerous trees and a paved road running alongside. The main building is rectangular with a low-pitched roof and several windows distributed along its facade, suggesting a focus on natural light. The property includes a secondary smaller outbuilding, possibly a garage or shed, situated near the main house. The surrounding area is dotted with evenly spaced trees, providing shade and a sense of privacy. The road adjacent to the property is wide and marked with a yellow center line, indicating it is suitable for vehicular traffic. The overall setting evokes a suburban or semi-urban neighborhood with a blend of built and natural elements.
description: A single-story bungalow with a low-pitched roof, surrounded by trees and adjacent to a paved road, featuring multiple windows and a secondary outbuilding.
description_view_0: The main bungalow and outbuilding are visible with a clear view of the tree-lined property and the adjacent road.
description_view_1: The view highlights the road running parallel to the property and shows the rear and side of the bungalow, with more trees visible.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective reveals the full layout of the bungalow, outbuilding, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees.
description_view_3: The road is most prominent, with the bungalow and trees appearing further in the background, emphasizing the property's frontage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with multiple side and front windows
